message.content:
{
  "summary": "The extraction partially succeeded but failed the overall validation due to significant omissions in the line items and incorrect mapping of values. While header fields like company, date, and totals were mostly correct, the line item extraction missed 4 items and incorrectly attributed the '1 Plate' price (9.10) to 'CHOW MEIN-1/2' items.",
  "failure_reasons": [
    "line_item_omission",
    "incorrect_field_mapping",
    "incorrect_line_item_total"
  ],
  "field_notes": {
    "company": "Correct.",
    "date": "Correct (format differs from gold but value is identical).",
    "address": "Included a phone number which was not in the gold address field.",
    "subtotal": "Correct.",
    "tax": "Correct.",
    "total": "Correct.",
    "line_items": "Failed. The model missed 4 line items. Additionally, it incorrectly assigned the '9.10' price (which belongs to '1 Plate') to 'CHOW MEIN-1/2' items. It also failed to capture several items that had no price listed in the gold labels but were present in the receipt structure."
  }
}
